author: SypherPK
text:
Finding ALL 5 NEW SPRITES in FORTNITE!
Today I'm obtaining all 5 of the newest sprites in Fortnite! By the end of 1 match with each, I'll be ranking them on a scale of 1-10 based on how useful they actually are. Enjoy!
